# SEER Project Memory — auto-managed by SEER. Do not edit manually.

## 1. Project Overview
name: SEER MCP Server
goal: AI prompt intelligence platform — optimizes prompts via MCP, with Next.js dashboard for billing, usage, and API key management
stack: TypeScript / Express / Vercel / Supabase / Anthropic Haiku / Next.js 15 / React 19 / Tailwind CSS / Dodo Payments / Razorpay / Upstash Redis

## 2. Current Status
last_updated: 2026-03-25T04:59Z
phase: Build — mid (v1.1 MFA + mark-done + skins + docs complete)
last_completed: Dashboard docs page — all 10 tools with visuals, workflow diagram, feature highlights, quick reference table
next_action: SHA-256 integrity hash on .seer_memory.md, cloud memory sync

## 3. Architecture Decisions
- Remote HTTP MCP on Vercel (NOT stdio) — StreamableHTTPServerTransport
- Haiku ONLY for AI calls — max_tokens 800, ~$0.001 per call
- SEER instructs Claude to read/write .seer_memory.md — Claude uses user's own API key, not Haiku
- Dodo Payments as MoR for global, Razorpay for India
- Supabase for auth + database + RLS on all tables
- OpenAI text-embedding-3-small for memory vector search (Pro+ only)
- In-memory rate limiting on MCP server, Upstash Redis for web login rate limiting
